channel.title: UI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in UI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: See your serverless: introducing the Headlamp plugin for Knative
item.description:
Headlamp now has a Knative plugin that adds integrated views and actions for Knative resources in the Kubernetes UI. It centralizes KService management, traffic splitting, autoscaling configuration, metrics, and related CRDs, with release 0.3.0-beta available.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: github: Copilot CLI: New terminal interface is generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot CLI’s redesigned terminal interface is now generally available. It adds a tabbed layout for working with GitHub directly from the terminal.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot code review: AGENTS.md support and UI improvements
item.description:
Copilot code review now reads repository-level AGENTS.md files and adds a Request button to make it easier to ask Copilot for a review on draft pull requests. GitHub says these updates are generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: k8s: From Kubernetes Dashboard to Headlamp: Understanding the Transition
item.description:
Kubernetes Dashboard has been archived, and this post explains how Headlamp maps to Dashboard workflows while adding multi-cluster support, application-centric views, plugins, and flexible deployment options. It also notes that a step-by-step migration guide will follow.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: github: New Sort by control added to Notifications
item.description:
GitHub Notifications now includes a new “Sort by” control with two options: “Newest to oldest” and “Oldest to newest.” The default behavior remains “Newest to oldest.”

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Repository member role labels now in pull request list view
item.description:
GitHub now shows repository member role labels inline in the pull request list view for public repositories. Labels such as First-time contributor, Contributor, and Member appear directly in the list.

  • Source: GitHub
